productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Navy Blue Polo T-shirts
description: CompositionNavy blue polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a plaid fabric collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with rolled cuffs made of plaid fabric with buttoned flaps, buttoned chest placket, welt pocket with a buttoned closure on the left chest and vented hemsFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryLook cool and sophisticated in this navy blue  polo neck T-shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The welt pocket and the plaid collar and cuffs add interesting details to this tee, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
